title: Thousands rally in Havana after U.S. indicts Raul Castro
description:
Thousands of Cubans gathered outside the U.S. Embassy in Havana on Friday, May 22, to protest the United States’ decision to indict former Cuban President Raul Castro.

The rally, organised by the Cuban government, comes amid rising tensions between Havana and Washington. Demonstrators waved Cuban flags and chanted slogans including “Viva Raul” and “Patria o Muerte”, which translates to “Homeland or Death”.

description: A 32-year manhunt concluded with the arrest of Rabindra Mallick, accused of a 1994 murder. Police discovered him in a secret underground chamber at his Jajpur home after he returned for a family event. Mallick had lived under false identities and worked as a mason in various states, evading capture for decades. His bail plea was denied.

description: Google co-founder Sergey Brin is injecting significant funds into San Francisco's local politics, backing a business-friendly tax proposal while opposing a controversial "Overpaid CEO Tax."
